## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] The code and docs changes are coherent and reviewable.
- [ ] If Scala behavior changed, the relevant Scaladoc was updated in the same PR.
- [ ] If Scala files changed, the updated Scaladoc comments are present in the source diff.
- [ ] If Scala files changed, `sbt doc` was run locally and any generation problems were addressed before review.
- [ ] Documentation links in `README.md` / `docs/index.md` still point at the right generated-doc entry points.
